english_text:
A. Faith vs. Disbelief (1 - 20 verses).
B. Allah's creation and knowledge (21 - 39).
C. Deliverance of Shariah to Bani Israel (40 - 103).
D. Details of how Ibrahim (AS) was tested (104 - 141).
E. Ka'ba is the new qibla (142 - 152).
F. Details of how Muslims will be tested (153 - 177).
G. Deliverance of Shariah to Muslims (178 - 253).
H. Allah's creation and knowledge (254 - 284).
I. Faith vs. Disbelief (285 - 286).
alt_text: Nine-point list (A through I) outlining the thematic sections of Surah al-Baqara with verse ranges, showing the chiastic structure centered on E ('Ka'ba is the new qibla') highlighted in red.
notes: Topical analysis of Surah al-Baqara (Quran 2) showing its ring composition with Ka'ba as the central pivot.
